title: Bare Bones x Capybara Mob
description:
Ever wanted capybaras in Minecraft… but without installing mods or changing your world?
This resource pack lets you bring the chillest animal on Earth into your game in the most vanilla-friendly way possible.
body:
**Capybaras in Vanilla — Renameable Pig!**

Ever wanted capybaras in Minecraft… but without installing mods or changing your world?
This resource pack lets you bring the chillest animal on Earth into your game in the most vanilla-friendly way possible.
With a simple rename, a normal pig will visually transform into a fully modeled Capybara, complete with a custom texture and an adorable in  game look that still fits Minecraft’s style.
Perfect for cozy survival worlds, animal farms, roleplay servers, and anyone who wants their world to feel more alive (and way cuter).

**Rename a pig**

Once renamed correctly, the pig will change its appearance and become a capybara.

**Spawn Egg Included**

This pack also updates the Pig Spawn Egg, so it matches the capybara theme and looks consistent with the new mob style.

**Part of the Capybara War set! 👑**
- Recommended to bundle with the BareBones Texturepack for a better experience!
